parts.text:
{
  "mission_codename": "OPERATION SHADOW GAMBIT",
  "target": "Our target is the heavily fortified Chronos Vault, owned by the secretive Aethel Corporation.",
  "location_flavor": "The heist takes place during a late-night torrential downpour, offering a narrow two-hour window before the morning shift change.",
  "antagonist_move": "Inspector Vega has just introduced a new AI-driven surveillance system across the city, making our movements significantly riskier.",
  "briefing_text": "This is your initiation, Planner. The Aethel Corporation's Chronos Vault holds more than just gold; it's rumored to contain ancient schematics that could shift the balance of power in the Underworld. Failure isn't an option; succeed, and you earn your place among the elite. Fail, and you'll be just another ghost swallowed by the city's shadows.",
  "mission_hook": "The vault's security system is entirely analog, meaning no digital footprints but requiring precise mechanical bypasses."
}
